ddls:
CREATE TABLE "users" (
  "user_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each user */,
  "username" TEXT /* Username chosen by the user */,
  "email" TEXT /* Email address of the user */,
  "role" TEXT /* Role of the user (e.g., user, moderator, admin) */,
  "first_name" TEXT /* First name of the user */,
  "last_name" TEXT /* Last name of the user */,
  "profile_picture" TEXT /* URL of the user's profile picture */,
  "bio" TEXT /* Brief bio of the user */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Timestamp when the user account was created */,
  "last_login" TEXT /* Timestamp of the user's last login */,
  "notify_new_replies" INTEGER /* Whether the user wants to receive notifications for new replies */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("user_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "threads" (
  "thread_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each thread */,
  "title" TEXT /* Title of the thread */,
  "views" INTEGER /* Number of views for the thread */,
  "replies" INTEGER /* Number of replies to the thread */,
  "author_id" INTEGER /* ID of the author who created the thread */,
  "last_post_date" TEXT /* Date of the last post in the thread */,
  "last_post_author" TEXT /* Author of the last post in the thread */,
  "content" TEXT /* Content of the thread */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Timestamp when the thread was created */,
  "updated_at" TEXT /* Timestamp when the thread was last updated */,
  "is_pinned" INTEGER /* Whether the thread is pinned */,
  "is_locked" INTEGER /* Whether the thread is locked */,
  "category_id" INTEGER /* ID of the category the thread belongs to */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("thread_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_threads_author_id FOREIGN KEY ("author_id") REFERENCES users ("user_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_threads_category_id FOREIGN KEY ("category_id") REFERENCES categories ("category_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "posts" (
  "post_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each post */,
  "thread_id" INTEGER /* ID of the thread the post belongs to */,
  "author_id" INTEGER /* ID of the author who made the post */,
  "content" TEXT /* Content of the post */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Timestamp when the post was created */,
  "updated_at" TEXT /* Timestamp when the post was last updated */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("post_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_posts_thread_id FOREIGN KEY ("thread_id") REFERENCES threads ("thread_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_posts_author_id FOREIGN KEY ("author_id") REFERENCES users ("user_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "categories" (
  "category_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each category */,
  "name" TEXT /* Name of the category */,
  "description" TEXT /* Brief description of the category */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("category_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "thread_categories" (
  "thread_id" INTEGER /* ID of the thread */,
  "category_id" INTEGER /* ID of the category */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("thread_id", "category_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "thread_replies" (
  "reply_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each reply */,
  "thread_id" INTEGER /* ID of the thread the reply belongs to */,
  "author_id" INTEGER /* ID of the author who made the reply */,
  "content" TEXT /* Content of the reply */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Timestamp when the reply was created */,
  "updated_at" TEXT /* Timestamp when the reply was last updated */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("reply_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_thread_replies_author_id FOREIGN KEY ("author_id") REFERENCES users ("user_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_thread_replies_thread_id FOREIGN KEY ("thread_id") REFERENCES threads ("thread_id")
)
